theme_and_archetype.archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Adapted for Tech/Terminal Control Room
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Mission Control dashboard for AI agents requires absolute functional clarity, high contrast for real-time data, and a technical aesthetic. Employs "Crystal Glass" surfaces over a dark navy void.

cards.classes: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] rounded-xl

terminal.classes: bg-black border border-green-500/30 rounded-lg p-4 font-mono shadow-[inset_0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,0,0.05)]

buttons.primary: bg-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-400 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50
buttons.danger: bg-red-500/10 hover:bg-red-500/20 text-red-500 border border-red-500/50 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/10 text-gray-300 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense internal padding (p-4 to p-6) for data widgets, generous external gaps (gap-6 to gap-8)
layout_and_spacing.page_container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8

components.navigation: Sticky header with backdrop-blur. Contains 'MISSION CONTROL' logo (JetBrains Mono), Search Bar (glassmorphism input), Bell Icon, Settings Gear, and a pulsing Connection Status Dot (green/red).
components.stat_cards: Glassmorphism cards displaying a metric. Include an icon (lucide-react) and a subtle gradient text or sparkline chart if applicable.
components.live_agent_feed: Table or List view. Columns: Agent Name (bold), Model (badge), Status (colored dot: green=active, yellow=idle, red=error), Current Task, Tokens Used, Cost. Use monospaced numbers for tabular data.
components.task_queue: List of tasks with compact Shadcn Progress bars. Priority dots (Red=High, Yellow=Medium, Blue=Low). Filter tabs at the top.
components.chat_command: Fixed to bottom or bottom of activity panel. Glassmorphism input with submit arrow icon.
components.kanban_board: 4 columns (Queued, In Progress, Completed, Failed). Columns are subtle border blocks. Cards are draggable (conceptually) glassmorphism blocks.
components.agent_detail_panel: Side drawer or modal. Contains performance stats, action timeline, scrolling live terminal (retro green on black), and action buttons (Message, Steer, Kill).
components.charts: Recharts wrapped in Shadcn Chart components. Use brand colors (blue, green, red, amber) for data series against dark background.
components.settings_tabs: Shadcn Tabs component. Clean, form-heavy layouts using Shadcn inputs.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2 for clarity against dark backgrounds.

login_bg.description: Dark abstract tech texture for login page background. Apply an overlay like bg-[#0a0e1a]/80 to ensure form contrast.

accessibility_and_motion.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-submit', data-testid='agent-kill-button').
accessibility_and_motion.motion: Use Framer Motion for card entrances (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0). Terminal logs should slide up smoothly. Task progress bars should animate changes.
accessibility_and_motion.contrast: Ensure all text against the navy background passes WCAG AA. Text inside glass cards MUST be white or light gray (#d1d5db).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind classes. Do NOT write custom CSS unless absolutely necessary.
Implement glassmorphism heavily using `bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10`.
Use JetBrains Mono for Headings and Terminal. Use Inter for standard UI text.
Simulate WebSocket updates in the Dashboard, Agents, and Task pages using useEffect and setInterval (2-3s).
For the 'Live Terminal', create an auto-scrolling container with retro green text on a black background.
Charts must be styled to fit the dark theme, omitting default white grid lines and replacing them with rgba(255,255,255,0.05).
Do NOT use 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'JetBrains Mono'.
